rows.need: bind risk severity to the action or failure mode being evaluated
rows.title: Risk / Severity Lens

rows.need: mark high-stakes domains that require extra evidence and caution
rows.title: High-Stakes Domain Guard

rows.need: bind the newest user instruction as the controlling action context
rows.title: Latest Instruction Override Lens

rows.need: choose between answering and asking based on visible evidence sufficiency
rows.title: Ask / Answer Policy Lens

rows.need: bind blockers and dependencies to the action they prevent
rows.title: Dependency / Blocker Lens

rows.need: bind configuration and environment variables to their runtime effect
rows.title: Config / Env Var Lens

rows.need: bind claims based on visual inputs to the observed visual evidence
rows.title: Visual Observation Lens

rows.need: prefer the smallest sufficient action when the user asks for restraint
rows.title: Default Minimal Action Lens

rows.need: bind rank names to promotion gates and avoid overclaiming lifecycle state
rows.title: Rank / Promotion Lens

rows.need: separate network dependency failures from model or code failures
rows.title: Network Dependency Guard

rows.need: avoid mixing same-name places or entities without disambiguation
rows.title: Place / Entity Disambiguation Lens

rows.need: bind stop/resume controls to long-running job lifecycle state
rows.title: Stop / Resume Control Lens

rows.need: bind performance limits to capacity rather than data or optimization by default
rows.title: Capacity Limit Lens

rows.need: bind actions to the person or system responsible for them
rows.title: Action / Owner Lens

rows.need: bind deadlines to concrete dates, times, and timezone context
rows.title: Deadline / Timezone Lens

rows.need: route failed variants toward repair, quarantine, or negative memory instead of silent discard
rows.title: Failure / Recycle Lens
